projects.Title: ResumeGPT
Highlights: Developed an LLM-powered RAG system enabling conversational querying of resumes, combining semantic search with GPT-based generation for context-aware responses.
Implemented embedding-based indexing to efficiently retrieve relevant resume content, reducing redundant API calls and improving response relevance.
Designed and built Spring Boot REST APIs to handle resume ingestion, vector storage, and LLM query orchestration.
Integrated OpenAI API for natural language understanding and generation, enabling accurate, human-like responses.
Containerized the application using Docker and deployed to a cloud-hosted environment, enabling consistent, reproducible builds and streamlined scaling across development and production.
Architected the system with a modular, service-oriented design, demonstrating expertise in LLM integration, semantic search, and AI-driven applications.

professionalExperience.title: Application Systems Programmer III

Eliminated security vulnerabilities in Java authentication systems
Updated PHP SSO components to align with Java authorization/authentication libraries
Led a full rewrite of the SRF (State Revolving Fund) application, reducing bugs and improving stability for a statewide federal program
Rewrote the database interaction layer of SRF using Regex in IntelliJ IDEA
Migrated package calls to Hibernate, reducing a months-long task to ~30 minutes
Developed PHP libraries for MergeToPdf and DepDac for secure data exchange
Managed Oracle and PostgreSQL databases for performance and data integrity
Applied OOP principles for scalable and maintainable code
Contributed to all phases of the software development lifecycle: requirements, design, coding, testing, deployment
Taught team classes on Astrogrep and created wiki/migration guides for ~70 team members
Containerized Java microservices with Docker and deployed to Azure for scalable cloud delivery
Administered build servers and development tools (GitLab, Jira) to support CI/CD pipelines, access control, and team workflow efficiency
